Appliances.

“Curtis International Ltd. manufactures and distributes quality, value priced consumer electronic & appliances. Our product line includes a broad range of items, such as televisions, audio equipment, home appliances, and other electronic accessories. We market these products under several well-known brand names, including RCA, Proscan, FRIGIDAIRE™, HAMILTON BEACH® , Culinary Chef™,  Budweiser, Bud Light, Pepsi, Mountain Dew, Dr. Pepper, Orange Crush and Curtis. ”
